name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
description: RBAC grants permissions through roles rather than to users directly: an authenticated subject's assigned roles are activated in a session, and a requested operation is allowed only if some active role carries the permission and no separation-of-duty constraint is violated; every decision is logged for audit.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Request operation"]
    N2["Authenticate subject"]
    N3["Look up roles"]
    N4["Activate session roles"]
    N5{"Roles grant perm?"}
    N6["Deny operation"]
    N7["Check SoD constraints"]
    N8{"Constraint violated?"}
    N9["Block (conflict)"]
    N10["Permit operation"]
    N11["Log decision"]
    N12["Enforced policy"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 -->|no| N6
    N6 --> N11
    N5 -->|yes| N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|yes| N9
    N9 --> N11
    N8 -->|no| N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 --> N12

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
